name: Tomato Bruschetta~ Lo Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast bread slices.
2. Rub the cut side of each hot toast with a halved garlic clove.
3. Heat oil in a nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook, stirring until tender.
4. Add diced tomato, oregano, and pepper to the skillet. Stir to combine.
5. Spoon the tomato mixture onto the garlic side of each hot toast.
6. Serve immediately or sprinkle with Parmesan cheese and broil for 1 minute.
